rows.label: tev027101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Suriella what she's doing here.

rows.label: tev027101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Suriella if she's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Suriella what she's doing here.

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, have you come to
see the town helper?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0002
rows.name:
...I'm sorry, what? You don't
know who the town helper is?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0003
rows.name: It's me, silly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm a Companion, but I started dabbling on the
side— I teach weapon skills, offer equipment
tips, deliver lost items, give life advice...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Folks just started calling
me the "town helper." I kind
of like it, to be honest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0101
rows.name:
Hey, guess what? Now I'm
doing couples therapy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0102
rows.name:
The two I'm helping now are clearly
very upset. I'm trying to give them a
little perspective and calm them down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0103
rows.name:
It's not easy to understand how someone
feels— like, REALLY understand them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0104
rows.name:
But I can still empathize, offer some grounded advice,
and try to get them talking civilly to each other
again. Really, it's the least a town helper can do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0111
rows.name:
I guess it's a sign the human race has finally
recovered from the crash and settled in, because
people are starting to get up to no good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0112
rows.name:
I've heard stories of BLADEs screwing over their
teammates in some really nasty ways just so they
can keep the rewards to themselves. Awful...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0113
rows.name:
You be really careful when you
choose your team. Don't let anyone
near you that you don't trust.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0201
rows.name:
Oh, she was just telling me
about her hometown and the
family she had to leave behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0202
rows.name:
It's sad. I may be the town helper, but
one thing I can't do is take people back
to Earth to see the people they lost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0203
rows.name:
Still, she says it's nice just to be
able to talk about it with someone now
and then, so I'm happy to oblige.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev027101_MSG0204
rows.name:
I wish I could have seen the...um...Earth
town that she called home.[ST:wait ]
